---
title: "Partners & Funding"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

## Sponsor

The DAWA project is sponsored by the **Centre for Primary Care and
Public Health (Unisanté), University of Lausanne**, Switzerland.

## Implementation Partners

- **Centre for Primary Care and Public Health (Unisanté), University of
  Lausanne, Switzerland**
- **Ifakara Health Institute (IHI)**, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
- **Zanzibar Ministry of Health**, Tanzania

## Funding

DAWA is funded by:

- **Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF)** — Grant PZ00P3\_216330
- **Cadot Prize**, University of Lausanne
